mapper.select:
select m.id shopid,c.id cid,c.p_id,c.user_id,a.product_title,a.id goodsId,a.status,m.is_open,m.logo,m.name as mch_name,m.collection_num from lkt_user_collection as c left join lkt_product_list as a on c.p_id = a.id left join lkt_mch as m on
a.mch_id = m.id c.mch_id = m.id
c.add_time ${add_time_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}
select count(1) from lkt_user_collection as c left join lkt_product_list as a on c.p_id = a.id

SELECT a.id AS shopid, c.id, c.mch_id, a.head_img AS img, a.NAME AS mch_name, a.is_open, a.collection_num FROM lkt_user_collection AS c inner JOIN lkt_mch AS a ON c.mch_id = a.id WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id} AND c.type = 1 AND c.user_id = #{user_id} and a.name like concat('%',#{mchNameOrProName},'%') ORDER BY c.add_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.p_id, p.product_title, p.mch_id, a.recovery as recycle, p.imgurl, a.goods_price as price FROM lkt_user_collection AS c LEFT JOIN lkt_auction_product AS a ON c.p_id = a.id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list p on a.goods_id = p.id WHERE p.store_id = #{store_id} AND c.type = 3 AND c.user_id = #{user_id} and p.product_title like concat('%',#{mchNameOrProName},'%')

SELECT a.id AS shopid, c.id, c.mch_id, a.head_img AS img, a.name AS mch_name, a.is_open FROM lkt_user_collection AS c inner JOIN lkt_mch AS a ON c.mch_id = a.id WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id} AND c.type = 3 AND c.user_id = #{user_id} AND c.p_id is NULL and a.name like concat('%',#{mchNameOrProName},'%') ORDER BY c.add_time DESC
